title: ASL Interpretation with Deep Learning
description: Developing a deep learning pipeline for ASL video classification using CNN and CNN-LSTM architectures. Evaluating signer-independent generalization, bounding-box preprocessing, and top-k accuracy across controlled experimental splits.

title: Steam Review Analysis
description: This project analyzes a dataset of Steam game metadata and user reviews to build a machine learning model that predicts whether a game will be successful based on its features and review information. It involves data cleaning, feature engineering, and supervised learning to classify games as successful or not from attributes like genres, platforms, and review scores.

title: Amazon Review Sentiment as a Predictor of Economic Trends
description: This project investigates whether consumer sentiment expressed in Amazon product reviews can serve as an early indicator of broader economic trends.

title: Emissions Explorer
description: This project explores how greenhouse gas emissions have changed over time across regions and sectors, using interactive visualizations to highlight which sources and gases are driving overall emissions trends.

title: Persuasive/Deceptive Visualization
description: Two opposing visualizations with rationale and ethics reflection.

title: Time-Series Modeling of Mental Health Indicators
description: Time-series analysis of CDC mental health survey data using Bayesian and Prophet models to forecast national anxiety and depression trends and quantify demographic disparities.

title: Modeling How Moisture Affects Wildfire Spread
description: MATLAB cellular automaton simulation modeling wildfire propagation under varying moisture and drying conditions. Explores ignition probability, moisture inhibition, and fire-induced drying dynamics.
